LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_SMG.label: 10mm SMG
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_SMG.description: The 10mm SMG is a compact, fully automatic submachine gun chambered for 10mm rounds. Known for its high rate of fire and ease of use, it is ideal for close-quarters combat but sacrifices accuracy at longer ranges.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_SMG.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_SMG.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_HK_10_SMG.label: HK-10 SMG
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_HK_10_SMG.description: The HK-10 is a modern, compact submachine gun known for its reliability and high rate of fire. Favored by security forces and elite units for urban operations.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_HK_10_SMG.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_HK_10_SMG.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_9mm_SMG.label: 9mm SMG
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_9mm_SMG.description: The 9mm SMG is a lightweight, fully automatic submachine gun chambered for 9mm rounds. Known for its ease of use and high rate of fire, it is effective in close-quarters combat but lacks stopping power and accuracy at longer ranges.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_9mm_SMG.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_9mm_SMG.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_127mm_SMG.label: 12.7mm SMG
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_127mm_SMG.description: The 12.7mm SMG is a powerful, fully automatic submachine gun chambered for 12.7mm rounds. Known for its high damage output and rapid rate of fire, it is devastating in close-quarters combat but suffers from heavy recoil and limited accuracy at range.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_127mm_SMG.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_127mm_SMG.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_22_SMG.label: Silenced .22 SMG
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_22_SMG.description: A lightweight, fully automatic submachine gun chambered for .22 LR rounds and equipped with an integral suppressor. Extremely quiet and easy to control, but lacks stopping power compared to larger calibers.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_22_SMG.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_22_SMG.tools.1.label: barrel
